---
title: "Get in touch"
---

I'm a scientist who became a biostatistician, finishing my Master's in Biostatistics at the University of Florida (graduating Spring 2027). I'm looking for opportunities in clinical research, biostatistics, healthcare analytics, and pharmaceutical data science.

Whether you're recruiting, exploring a collaboration, or simply want to discuss statistics, data visualization, or healthcare analytics, I'd be happy to connect. I read every message and do my best to reply within a day or two.

📧 **Email:** [jonathanmu13\@gmail.com](mailto:jonathanmu13@gmail.com)

💼 **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/jonathan-muniz-fl](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-muniz-fl)

You can also find my work on [GitHub](https://github.com/Jonathanmuniz13) and [Kaggle](https://www.kaggle.com/themuniz).
